creator: h2+fbsdports@fsfe.org
text:
Created attachment 190628
update for biology/seqan-apps

I have updated the patch to include an option for AVX2 and for native builds. I don't think AVX512 is optimised enough on any of the apps, yet, to provide a benefit and people can just chose NATIVE to get it. (And I didn't want to add three xtra options that no-one uses ;-) ).
